product_surfaces: internal/diagnostics/redaction.go: Filter.RedactText, RedactBytes, RedactHeaders, RedactURL, RedactJSONBody, RawAPIResponseSummary, and RedactedWriter
internal/config/config.go: RedactDiagnostic shared diagnostic redaction boundary for env token, e2e repo coordinates, base URLs, config paths, and local filesystem paths
internal/cli/cli.go: auth status rendering, doctor command rendering, live auth probe failure diagnostics, and generic writeError error rendering
internal/doctor/doctor.go: doctor report construction and redacted text/JSON rendering through CLI command path
internal/gitcode/redaction.go: compatibility wrappers for redacted live-provider captures
internal/e2e/two_cache_test.go: TestE2ELiveTwoCache testLogger output redaction and no-live skip path
evidence_type: offline Go package tests plus compiled CLI runtime commands against a local loopback HTTP 401 stub exercising auth status, doctor JSON, live auth-probe error diagnostics, diagnostics writer/header/url/body redaction, and e2e test binary build/skip behavior
freshness: current working tree Go packages and freshly built cmd/gitcode-mcp binary; deterministic fake secrets and loopback stub only; live validation disabled
mocks_used: external dependencies only: GitCode live API is replaced by a local loopback HTTP stub returning deterministic 401 responses with fake sensitive headers/body so the real CLI live diagnostic path runs offline
